description: AVI + UX refinement — (1) AVI transcode-cache hygiene: size-capped LRU eviction for data/transcoded/ plus startup cleanup of orphaned .tmp.mp4 files, to stop unbounded disk growth from watched AVIs; (2) deterministic per-item star rating (stable 3–5 stars derived from media id) shown identically on home cards and the watch page, replacing the interactive 'Rate this' control (watch.js initRatings); (3) additional small UX refinements to be scoped in discovery. This branch will go through a significant QA / code-review pass.
completed_tasks: A: transcode-cache LRU eviction (parseCacheCap/selectEvictions/cleanupOrphanTmp/evictTranscodeCache) wired into close-handler + startup
A: recently-served protection so an actively-watched transcode is never evicted (fixes review finding)
B: getStarRating(id) in common.js; deterministic 3-5 shared by home cards and watch page
B: removed interactive rating (initRatings/drawStars/highlightStars + localStorage) -> read-only renderStarRating
3: watch-page keyboard shortcuts (space/f/m + existing arrows) with modifier/interactive-element/overlay guards
tests: 20 new node:test cases (cap parsing, eviction selection incl. edge cases, orphan cleanup, protection, getStarRating)

history.note: Bootstrapped and staged for discovery; no overlapping active plans, tech-debt tracker empty

Exec plan written to docs/exec-plans/active/avi-ux-refinement.md. Included Item 3 = keyboard shortcuts only; theme toggle found already implemented; continue-watching/autoplay-next/srt deferred. Ready for engineering-manager review.

Technical Design appended to exec plan by principal-engineer. Grounded in server.js (parseCacheCap/selectEvictions/cleanupOrphanTmp/evictTranscodeCache, wired into processTranscodeQueue close-handler + startup), common.js getStarRating (with require-safe shims), main.js/watch.js/watch.html rating rendering, and watch.js keydown extension (reusing existing SKIP_SECONDS + handler). 11-item ordered task breakdown provided. artifacts.design set. Ready for engineering-manager task stage.
Implemented all three items + tests; lint 0 errors, 46 tests green; startup eviction/orphan-cleanup smoke-tested. Committed.

Significant QA/code-review pass: /code-review workflow (high, 4 finders + verify) + quality-assurance agent. Found + fixed: eviction-vs-active-stream race (added recently-served protection, not atime-reliant), keyboard handler (modifier-key/interactive-element/overlay guards + play/fullscreen .catch), missing cap edge-case tests, unexported constant, dead cursor CSS. 51 tests green. Closed the unbounded-cache tech-debt item.
